interfaces.name: ReviewState
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewState: String, Codable, Sendable { case draft, inReview, needsRework, approved }
interfaces.notes: Canonical status machine.

interfaces.name: ReviewEventType
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewEventType: String, Codable, Sendable { case created, importVersion, submitForReview, requestRework, approve, autoRevertToDraft, deleteCampaign, deleteAsset, restoreFromTrash, restoreComplete }
interfaces.notes: Backbone of status history action typing.

interfaces.name: TrashState
interfaces.signature: enum TrashState: String, Codable, Sendable { case active, pendingDelete, deleted }
interfaces.notes: Soft-delete finite state for campaign/asset safety.

interfaces.name: Campaign
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Campaign { var id: UUID; var briefText: String; var createdAt: Date; var isTrashed: Bool; var scheduledDeletionAt: Date?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade, inverse: \Asset.campaign) var assets: [Asset] }
interfaces.notes: Campaign-as-container invariant; SwiftData model in CockpitData package.

interfaces.name: Asset
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Asset { var id: UUID; var campaign: Campaign?; var currentVersionID: UUID; var status: ReviewStatus; var isTrashed: Bool; var scheduledDeletionAt: Date?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade, inverse: \AssetVersion.asset) var versions: [AssetVersion]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade, inverse: \ReviewEvent.asset) var events: [ReviewEvent] }
interfaces.notes: currentVersionID is the only field a new upload changes.

interfaces.name: AssetVersion
interfaces.signature: @Model final class AssetVersion { var id: UUID; var asset: Asset?; var versionNumber: Int; var relativeFilePath: String; var fileType: String; var fileSizeBytes: Int64; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Immutable once written, file-backed only (relativeFilePath). Embedding bytes directly (Gemma3's proposal) is explicitly rejected as a regression against the locked file-backed-asset decision.

interfaces.name: ReviewEvent
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ReviewEvent { var id: UUID; var campaign: Campaign?; var asset: Asset?; var kind: ReviewEventKind; var actor: EventActor; var note: String?; var timestamp: Date }
interfaces.notes: Append-only, drives Status History; never mutated or deleted.

interfaces.name: ReviewStateMachine
interfaces.signature: protocol ReviewStateMachine { func canTransition(from: ReviewState, to: ReviewState) -> Bool; func transition(assetID: UUID, to: ReviewState, note: String?, timestamp: Date) throws -> ReviewEvent }
interfaces.notes: Owns all transition guardrails; used by services and tested in unit tests.

interfaces.name: VersioningPolicy
interfaces.signature: protocol VersioningPolicy { func nextVersionIndex(currentVersionIDs: [UUID]) -> Int; func markAsCurrent(currentID: UUID?, newVersionID: UUID) -> UUID }
interfaces.notes: Append-only policy helper, no overwrite semantics.

interfaces.name: StatusDerivation
interfaces.signature: protocol StatusDerivation { func campaignWorstStatus(assets: [Asset], eventLog: [ReviewEvent]) -> ReviewState?; func assetCurrentVersionID(_ asset: Asset) -> UUID? }
interfaces.notes: Single source for aggregate state and current-version logic.

interfaces.name: InputValidation
interfaces.signature: protocol InputValidation { func isNonEmptyTrimmed(_ text: String) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Reject whitespace-only brief and rework notes everywhere.

interfaces.name: AssetFileStore
interfaces.signature: protocol AssetFileStore { func copyToAppStorage(sourceURL: URL, destinationRelativePath: String) async throws -> URL; func validateFile(url: URL) -> Bool; func deleteIfExists(relativePath: String) throws; func exists(relativePath: String) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: All binary IO in Application Support with atomic write semantics.

interfaces.name: CampaignRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol CampaignRepository: Sendable { func createCampaign(brief: String) async throws -> UUID; func updateBrief(campaignID: UUID, brief: String) async throws; func fetchCampaignList() throws -> [Campaign]; func softDeleteCampaign(id: UUID) async throws; func restoreCampaign(id: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Speaks only UUID, never PersistentIdentifier, to keep CockpitDomain SwiftData-free. Implemented as an actor in CockpitData.

interfaces.name: AssetRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol AssetRepository: Sendable { func createAsset(campaignID: UUID, initialFile: StoredFileReference) async throws -> UUID; func addVersion(assetID: UUID, campaignID: UUID, file: StoredFileReference) async throws -> UUID; func applyTransition(assetID: UUID, action: ReviewAction) async throws -> ReviewStatus; func fetchAssets(for campaignID: UUID) throws -> [Asset]; func softDeleteAsset(id: UUID) async throws; func restoreAsset(id: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: applyTransition runs ReviewStateMachine.transition then persists; also responsible for auto-revert-to-Draft + system ReviewEvent when the only in-review asset is deleted.

interfaces.name: HistoryRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol HistoryRepository { func append(_ event: ReviewEvent) async throws; func fetchForCampaign(_ campaignID: UUID) throws -> [ReviewEvent]; func fetchForAsset(_ assetID: UUID) throws -> [ReviewEvent]; func purgeEvents(olderThan: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Never mutates existing rows; append-only timeline source.

interfaces.name: StartupRecoveryService
interfaces.signature: protocol StartupRecoveryService { func reconcilePendingOperations(now: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Cold-launch repair for imports interrupted mid-write (distinct from SoftDeleteCoordinator's deletion-finalization sweep).

interfaces.name: UndoCoordinator
interfaces.signature: protocol UndoCoordinator { func beginDeletion(id: UUID, isCampaign: Bool, expiry: Date) async throws; func undoDeletion(id: UUID, isCampaign: Bool) async throws; func isPendingDeletion(id: UUID) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Backs undo-toasts and survives backgrounding.

interfaces.name: ThumbnailService
interfaces.signature: protocol ThumbnailService { func makeThumbnail(for fileURL: URL, size: CGSize) async throws -> UIImage? }
interfaces.notes: Uses QLThumbnailGenerator; async cached rendering.

interfaces.name: AppRoute
interfaces.signature: enum AppRoute: Hashable { case campaignList; case campaignDetail(UUID); case assetDetail(UUID); case statusHistoryCampaign(UUID); case statusHistoryAsset(UUID) }
interfaces.notes: Navigation stack route contract.

interfaces.name: CampaignListViewState
interfaces.signature: enum CampaignListViewState { case booting; case empty; case loaded([Campaign]); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Mandatory UI states for root screen, per design_handoff.

interfaces.name: CampaignDetailViewState
interfaces.signature: enum CampaignDetailViewState { case loading; case noAssets; case hasAssets([Asset]); case importInProgress(UUID, progress: Double); case importFailed(UUID, String); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Includes inline import failure/retry path.

interfaces.name: AssetDetailViewState
interfaces.signature: enum AssetDetailViewState { case loadingVersionMetadata; case draftPreReview; case previewReady; case previewFailed(String); case reviewWait; case reworkNoteRequired; case approveConfirmPending; case undoDeleteCountdown; case removedWhileViewing; case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: The nine locked Asset Detail states from design_handoff, including the terminal removed-while-viewing case.

interfaces.name: StatusHistoryViewState
interfaces.signature: enum StatusHistoryViewState { case loading; case empty; case listing([ReviewEventSnapshot]); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Timeline view, no nested transitions, lowest bug surface by design.

interfaces.name: CampaignListViewModel
interfaces.signature: protocol CampaignListViewModel { var state: CampaignListViewState { get }; func onAppear() async; func createCampaign(brief: String) async; func deleteCampaign(id: UUID) async; func undoLastDelete() async; func openCampaign(_ id: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: No direct repository or ModelContext access from views.

interfaces.name: CampaignDetailViewModel
interfaces.signature: protocol CampaignDetailViewModel { var state: CampaignDetailViewState { get }; func load(id: UUID) async; func importAsset(from url: URL, mediaTypeID: String) async; func retryImport(for assetID: UUID) async }
interfaces.notes: Holds campaign scoping and import lifecycle for screen.

interfaces.name: AssetDetailViewModel
interfaces.signature: protocol AssetDetailViewModel { var state: AssetDetailViewState { get }; func load(assetID: UUID) async; func requestReview() async; func requestRework(note: String) async; func approveWithConfirmation() async; func preview(versionID: UUID?) async throws -> URL; func deleteCurrentAsset(undoSeconds: TimeInterval) async }
interfaces.notes: Controls decision actions and read-only version selection.

interfaces.name: StatusHistoryViewModel
interfaces.signature: protocol StatusHistoryViewModel { var state: StatusHistoryViewState { get }; func load(scope: HistoryScope) async; func reload() async }
interfaces.notes: Single query per scope; immutable timeline rows.

interfaces.name: ClockService
interfaces.signature: protocol ClockService { var now: Date { get } }
interfaces.notes: Injectable time source so SoftDeleteCoordinator.reconcile and undo-window math are deterministically testable.

interfaces.name: ErrorPresenter
interfaces.signature: protocol ErrorPresenter { func userVisibleError(from error: Error) -> String; func report(_ error: Error, context: String) }
interfaces.notes: Maps internal errors to retryable user states without leaking internals; backs every screen's error state copy.

interfaces.name: AppLogger
interfaces.signature: protocol AppLogger { func log(_ level: String, message: String, metadata: [String: String]?) }
interfaces.notes: OSLog-backed diagnostics only; no analytics, no remote logging, consistent with locked privacy plan.

interfaces.name: isNonEmptyTrimmed
interfaces.signature: func isNonEmptyTrimmed(_ text: String) -> Bool
interfaces.notes: Shared validation gate for brief and rework notes.

interfaces.name: ReviewStatus
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewStatus: String, Codable, Comparable { case draft, inReview, needsRework, approved }
interfaces.notes: Comparable ordering backs WorstStatusDerivation.

interfaces.name: ReviewEventKind
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewEventKind: String, Codable { case created, versionAdded, submittedForReview, approved, needsRework, autoRevertedToDraft, assetTrashed, assetRestored, campaignTrashed, campaignRestored, deletionFinalized }
interfaces.notes: Backs HistoryEntryRow icon-keyed rendering.

interfaces.name: EventActor
interfaces.signature: enum EventActor: String, Codable { case user, system }
interfaces.notes: Real field backing user-vs-system visual distinction in Status History, not inferred from kind.

interfaces.name: ReviewAction
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewAction { case submitForReview; case approve; case needsRework(note: String) }
interfaces.notes: Input to ReviewStateMachine.transition.

interfaces.name: TransitionError
interfaces.signature: enum TransitionError: Error, Equatable { case invalidTransition(from: ReviewStatus, action: ReviewAction); case emptyReworkNote }
interfaces.notes: ReviewAction equality compares cases only, ignoring associated note text.

interfaces.name: ReviewStateMachine.transition
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewStateMachine { static func transition(from status: ReviewStatus, action: ReviewAction) -> Result<ReviewStatus, TransitionError> }
interfaces.notes: Pure function, zero SwiftData/SwiftUI imports, CockpitDomain package. Single source of truth so no view re-derives transition rules.

interfaces.name: WorstStatusDerivation.worstStatus
interfaces.signature: enum WorstStatusDerivation { static func worstStatus(for statuses: [ReviewStatus]) -> ReviewStatus? }
interfaces.notes: Used by Campaign List row chip and Status History campaign rollup; nil for zero-asset campaigns.

interfaces.name: ReworkNoteValidator.isValid
interfaces.signature: enum ReworkNoteValidator { static func isValid(_ note: String) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Trims whitespace/newlines before checking non-empty; gates Rework submit-button enabled state and brief-field validation.

interfaces.name: ReviewEventRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ReviewEventRepository: Sendable { func events(forCampaignID: UUID) async throws -> [ReviewEventSnapshot]; func events(forAssetID: UUID) async throws -> [ReviewEventSnapshot]; func append(_ event: ReviewEventSnapshot) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Read/append path for Status History; ordered oldest-to-newest, immutable snapshots, never mutates existing rows.

interfaces.name: ReviewEventSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewEventSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let kind: ReviewEventKind; let actor: EventActor; let note: String?; let timestamp: Date }
interfaces.notes: Sendable value type crossing the repository-actor boundary into view code.

interfaces.name: AssetFileStoring
interfaces.signature: protocol AssetFileStoring: Sendable { func importFile(from sourceURL: URL, assetID: UUID, versionNumber: Int) async throws -> StoredFileReference; func absoluteURL(for relativePath: String) -> URL; func validatePresentable(relativePath: String) -> Bool; func deleteFile(at relativePath: String) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Files live in Application Support/marketing_assets, atomic temp-file-then-rename writes. validatePresentable does the synchronous existence+non-zero-size check QuickLook needs before presenting.

interfaces.name: StoredFileReference
interfaces.signature: struct StoredFileReference: Sendable { let relativePath: String; let fileType: String; let fileSizeBytes: Int64 }
interfaces.notes: Returned by AssetFileStoring.importFile, consumed by AssetRepository.addVersion/createAsset.

interfaces.name: ImportCoordinator
interfaces.signature: actor ImportCoordinator { func importAsNewAsset(sourceURL: URL, campaignID: UUID, fileStore: AssetFileStoring, repository: AssetRepository) async throws -> UUID; func importAsNewVersion(sourceURL: URL, assetID: UUID, campaignID: UUID, fileStore: AssetFileStoring, repository: AssetRepository) async throws -> UUID }
interfaces.notes: Owns file-write-succeeds-before-record-create ordering and the security-scoped resource open/close window for .fileImporter URLs. Single enforcement point, not per-call-site.

interfaces.name: ThumbnailProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol ThumbnailProviding: Sendable { func thumbnail(for relativePath: String, size: CGSize) async -> UIImage? }
interfaces.notes: Backed by QLThumbnailGenerator with an in-memory NSCache keyed by assetVersionID+size; never blocks List scroll.

interfaces.name: SoftDeleteCoordinator
interfaces.signature: actor SoftDeleteCoordinator { func markScheduledForDeletion(kind: TrashableKind, id: UUID, windowSeconds: TimeInterval) async throws; func cancelScheduledDeletion(kind: TrashableKind, id: UUID) async throws; func reconcile(now: Date) async throws -> Int }
interfaces.notes: reconcile() called on cold launch AND on scenePhase transition to .active, not just launch — closes the background/foreground undo-window gap flagged this round. Returns count finalized.

interfaces.name: TrashableKind
interfaces.signature: enum TrashableKind { case campaign, asset }
interfaces.notes: Discriminates which repository SoftDeleteCoordinator dispatches finalize-delete to.

interfaces.name: CockpitSchema
interfaces.signature: enum CockpitSchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version { .init(1, 0, 0) }; static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [Campaign.self, Asset.self, AssetVersion.self, ReviewEvent.self] } }; enum CockpitMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan { static var schemas: [any VersionedSchema.Type] { [CockpitSchemaV1.self] }; static var stages: [MigrationStage] { [] } }
interfaces.notes: Real (if trivial) versioned schema + empty migration plan from day one, per locked architecture review — prevents total data loss on future model changes.

interfaces.name: ImportError
interfaces.signature: enum ImportError: Error { case unsupportedFileType, corruptOrUnreadable, diskWriteFailed, securityScopeUnavailable }
interfaces.notes: Surfaces to Campaign Detail's import-failed row state.

interfaces.name: Route
interfaces.signature: enum Route: Hashable { case campaignDetail(UUID); case assetDetail(UUID); case statusHistory(HistoryScope) }
interfaces.notes: Drives the single NavigationStack path array; UUID not PersistentIdentifier to stay Hashable/Sendable-simple.

interfaces.name: HistoryScope
interfaces.signature: enum HistoryScope: Hashable { case campaign(UUID); case asset(UUID) }
interfaces.notes: Distinguishes campaign-rollup history from single-asset history.

interfaces.name: AppEnvironment
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class AppEnvironment { let campaignRepository: CampaignRepository; let assetRepository: AssetRepository; let eventRepository: ReviewEventRepository; let fileStore: AssetFileStoring; let thumbnailService: ThumbnailProviding; let softDeleteCoordinator: SoftDeleteCoordinator }
interfaces.notes: Constructed once at app launch, injected via .environment(_:); no view touches ModelContext directly.

interfaces.name: StatusChip
interfaces.signature: struct StatusChip: View { let status: ReviewStatus; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth for color+icon+text+accessibility label so no call site can break the color-is-never-sole-signal rule.

interfaces.name: AccessibilityLabelFactory.label
interfaces.signature: enum AccessibilityLabelFactory { static func label(for status: ReviewStatus) -> String; static func label(versionNumber: Int, totalVersions: Int, isCurrent: Bool) -> String }
interfaces.notes: Composes explicit full-state strings ('Status: Needs Rework', 'Version 2 of 2, current') rather than relying on auto-derivation, per locked accessibility requirements.

interfaces.name: CockpitSchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum CockpitSchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version { .init(1, 0, 0) }; static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [Campaign.self, Asset.self, AssetVersion.self, ReviewEvent.self] } }; enum CockpitMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan { static var schemas: [any VersionedSchema.Type] { [CockpitSchemaV1.self] }; static var stages: [MigrationStage] { [] } }
interfaces.notes: Real, if trivial, versioned schema + empty migration plan from day one, per locked ios_architecture_review — prevents total data loss on future model changes.
